## Key Features

{{ range .Config.KeyFeatures.Features }}

## Technology Stack

- **Backend**: Go (Golang)
- **Database**: SQLite with FTS5 (Full-Text Search) and WAL (Write-Ahead Logging)
- **Interface**: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
- **Web**: Tailwind CSS v4, Go templates
